visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. A woman with short dark hair, wearing a navy blue off-the-shoulder top and a black beret, stands in front of a refrigerated display case. She holds a large clear plastic container of seafood fried rice, smiling widely with her mouth open. A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is overlaid at the top. (2) The camera cuts to a top-down close-up shot of the seafood fried rice inside the container. Visible ingredients include several large orange-pink shrimp, many small white scallops, and a generous amount of chopped green scallions scattered over the yellowish fried rice. The container has a price and ingredient label on its lid. (3) The woman shows the label closely to the camera, indicating the weight and price. The scene shifts back to her holding the box, gesturing with her free hand. She appears energetic and enthusiastic about the food item while looking directly at the lens. (4) Transition to an indoor kitchen setting. A second woman, wearing a purple ruffled top, receives the container from the first woman. The lighting is warm and domestic. She stands in front of a stove with various pots and pans in the background. (5) The woman in the purple top is seen stir-frying a portion of the seafood fried rice in a black wok over a gas stove. She uses a black spatula to toss the rice, shrimp, and scallops. The steam is clearly visible, suggesting the high heat of the cooking process. (6) A close-up shows her holding a container of 'Costco Pepper Salt' with a yellow lid. She shakes the seasoning onto the rice in the wok. The background shows a modern kitchen with white tiled walls and silver appliances. (7) Both women are now sitting at a table in a living room area. The first woman has changed into a white t-shirt and a zebra-patterned bucket hat. They both have small bowls and are eating the fried rice with spoons. They talk and gesture while eating, looking very satisfied with the taste. (8) The video ends with a shot of both women giving a 'thumbs up' gesture to the camera while holding their bowls. They are smiling, and a large text overlay appears at the bottom. The overall atmosphere is cheerful and promotional throughout the sequence.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 超豪華. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 干貝海鮮炒飯. (2) [Variety]: 超好吃?. (3) [Subtitle]: 好市多 現在賣炒飯. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (4) [Subtitle]: 還給你滿滿的海鮮量. (5) [Subtitle]: 有大蝦子. (6) [Subtitle]: 扇貝. (7) [Subtitle]: 炒飯一大盒. (8) [Subtitle]: 平均價格 都在400元左右. (9) [Subtitle]: 回去加熱看看. (10) [Subtitle]: 炒飯. (11) [Subtitle]: 謝謝妹妹. (12) [Subtitle]: 別客氣. (13) [Subtitle]: 我們直接把它平底鍋加熱. (14) [Subtitle]: 翻炒就可以了. (15) [Variety]: 好市多 胡椒鹽. (16) [Subtitle]: 一定要加在我們炒飯上面. (17) [Variety]: 好廚師 阿頭. (18) [Subtitle]: 上菜囉. (19) [Variety]: 粒粒分明. (20) [Subtitle]: 好吃的炒飯就是要. (21) [Subtitle]: 它每個飯粒粒分明之外. (22) [Subtitle]: 它的干貝醬干貝絲是整個散佈在所有的飯裡面. (23) [Subtitle]: 你吃得到一絲一絲. (24) [Subtitle]: 沒錯以及它的蔥花加的很多. (25) [Subtitle]: 還有它配的蛋也很好吃. (26) [Subtitle]: 大家只要再加一點點. (27) [Variety]: 靈魂胡椒鹽. (28) [Subtitle]: 好棒喔扇貝跟那個蝦子都很大顆. (29) [Subtitle]: 簡單的翻炒. (30) [Subtitle]: 你這全部一起加了. (31) [Subtitle]: 不需要思考. (32) [Subtitle]: 丟到鍋子 咻咻咻. (33) [Subtitle]: 嗯~就是你可以很簡單的翻炒加熱. (34) [Subtitle]: 就得到一鍋非常粒粒分明. (35) [Subtitle]: 然後調味有順序的. (36) [Variety]: 海鮮炒飯. (37) [Subtitle]: 真的好吃 這價格那麼大盒. (38) [Subtitle]: 4人份絕對沒有問題. (39) [Subtitle]: 值得買 推薦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female creators appear throughout the video; one is first seen in a beret at Costco, and the other is seen in a purple top cooking in a kitchen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The first woman has short dark hair and wears a navy top with a beret, later switching to a zebra bucket hat. The second woman has long dark hair and wears a purple ruffled top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background shifts between the industrial, shelf-lined aisles of a Costco warehouse and a domestic, modern home kitchen equipped with a gas stove and cooking utensils.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, energetic female voice speaking Traditional Chinese. Her tone is very enthusiastic and catchy, typical of a promotional video. Behind her voice, an upbeat, mid-tempo electronic BGM plays with a steady 4/4 beat. The music has a bright, positive feel throughout. (2) As the scene changes to the kitchen, the primary vocal shifts to a slightly lower, conversational tone but remains friendly and animated. A distinct sizzling sound of food being stir-fried in a hot pan is audible, providing a realistic acoustic layer to the cooking sequence. (3) A rhythmic percussive tapping sound is heard as the woman shakes a seasoning container. The BGM continues consistently in the background, maintaining the high-energy flow. The speech rate is fast, with short, excited pauses between phrases describing the various food ingredients. (4) During the tasting segment, the sound of metal spoons clinking against ceramic bowls is clearly heard. Both women are speaking simultaneously at points, creating a lively, overlapping vocal texture. Their voices exhibit high arousal and positive valence, characterized by soft laughter and emphasized pitch contours. (5) The video concludes with a final energetic vocal phrase, '值得買 推薦!', spoken with strong dominance and clarity. The BGM swells slightly before a clean hard cut. The spectral balance is bright throughout, emphasizing the vocal clarity and the crispness of the environmental sound effects.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Showcase -> Preparation -> Tasting -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves to promote a specific food item—scallop seafood fried rice—from Costco. By highlighting the generous portions of shrimp and scallops, demonstrating the simple stir-fry preparation method, and sharing a positive tasting experience, the video aims to persuade viewers that the product is a high-value and delicious convenience meal.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of the Costco logo, specific mentions of Costco seasoning, and an enthusiastic recommendation of the Costco-branded fried rice product.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-density text overlays and upbeat music to maintain a lively rhythm characteristic of social media food reviews.
